response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering fundamentals with 15+ years of experience and proven Principal-level seniority, the resume shows zero expertise in the core technical areas this role requires: AI/deep-learning workloads, GPU architecture, SoC/IP modeling, and hardware-software co-design. His background is entirely software-focused (web, backend, embedded systems), with no evidence of deep learning optimization, accelerator design, or hardware modeling experience. The recent career gap (caregiving, Oct 2025–May 2026) compounds concerns about re-entry into such a specialized domain at Principal level.
strengths: Demonstrated Principal/Staff-level seniority with 15+ years across multiple domains (web, embedded, backend), showing strong architectural thinking and technical leadership.
Proven expertise in performance optimization and low-latency systems (handled millions of requests/second at Sociomantic; async I/O, caching, database optimization).
Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming) and ability to rapidly master new languages/tools across diverse tech stacks.
concerns: No AI/deep-learning expertise or neural network optimization experience—a critical required skill for analyzing AI accelerator workloads and performance bottlenecks.
No GPU architecture, SoC design, or IP modeling experience; background is entirely software-focused, not hardware architecture or accelerator design.
Recently in career gap for caregiving (Oct 2025–May 2026); re-entering workforce for a Principal-level role requiring deep specialization in unfamiliar domain.

key_factors.factor: No GPU/SoC architecture or hardware modeling background
